final_prompt.prompt:
Use case: product-mockup
Asset type: luxury watch commercial photography, macro product shot
Primary request: top-down still life of a high-end Swiss tourbillon wristwatch on carbon fiber surface
Scene/backdrop: dark carbon fiber textured surface, softly blurred background to isolate the timepiece
Subject: 42mm tourbillon wristwatch with skeleton dial revealing intricate mechanical movement including balance wheel, hairspring, gear train and tourbillon cage; 18K rose gold case with diamond-set bezel, dark brown crocodile leather strap
Style/medium: luxury commercial product photography, photorealistic macro
Composition/framing: top-down macro shot, shallow depth of field with focus on tourbillon mechanism
Lighting/mood: professional jewelry photography lighting setup, multi-angle softboxes creating even highlights on metal surfaces without overexposure, emphasizing precision mechanical details
Color palette: warm rose gold + deep brown leather + dark carbon fiber + silver mechanical components
Materials/textures: polished 18K rose gold, faceted diamonds, genuine crocodile leather grain, brushed carbon fiber weave, precision-engineered steel gears
Constraints: focus must be on tourbillon mechanism, accurate color reproduction, commercial luxury aesthetic
Avoid: overexposed highlights, plastic-looking materials, deformed watch hands, artificial color cast, watermark
